title: 수술기록지
queries: 수술기록지 작성 항목 수술명 수술일자 집도의 마취방법 수술기록 의무기록
수술확인서 수술기록지 포함 정보 수술코드 수술명 수량 주수술 부수술
operative report required elements procedure anesthesia surgeon diagnosis
WHO Surgical Safety Checklist procedure anesthesia sign out

sources.summary: Full template image contains static labels for chart number, author, date, patient identifiers, diagnosis, operation rows, material treatment, anesthesia fee/time/method/agents/materials/injection orders.

Operative reports document surgery details in the medical record and commonly include diagnosis, procedure, surgeon/team, medications/anesthesia and postoperative context; used here only to support visible surgery/anesthesia field interpretation.
Procedure coding systems group codes around surgery and anesthesia services; used only as support for code/name/quantity pairing, not as a source for real billable codes.

Surgical safety documentation emphasizes patient/procedure confirmation, anesthesia-related checks, and procedure confirmation before leaving the operating room; used only as contextual support for anesthesia/procedure fields.

WHO Surgical Safety Checklist resources identify pre-anesthesia, pre-incision and sign-out phases, and include anesthesia machine/medication checks and procedure confirmation, supporting checkbox-style completion/role markers and anesthesia-related fields.
General anesthesia commonly uses IV and inhalational agents, airway devices and monitoring; used to diversify anesthesia materials and injection-order synthetic pools.
Operative reports commonly document procedure, diagnosis, anesthesia used, medications and surgeon orders; used to support procedure/material/anesthesia field semantics.

limitations: Korean official/public web search results were sparse in the available search surface; template image remained the binding source of truth.
conclusions: 주수술/부수술은 템플릿 컬럼 형태상 텍스트가 아니라 행별 역할 체크박스로 유지한다. 다만 생성 constraint는 정확히 한 행만 주수술이 되도록 primary_secondary_group을 사용한다.
마취시간은 마취료 섹션 내 단일 값 칸이므로 특정 시각보다 마취 소요시간(duration)으로 생성한다.
